prompt: A futuristic luxury skincare-style advertising poster in a pale icy blue monochrome palette, designed like a high-end tech-beauty campaign. The composition is vertical and airy with soft glowing light, misty gradients, translucent particle effects, and a clean editorial layout. On the left side, a young woman in a flowing white sleeveless dress is shown from the shoulders up in side profile, head tilted back as if inhaling fresh air, with dark windswept hair streaming outward. Her face is obscured by a plain square censor block. Fine luminous network lines and sparkling dots flow from her neck and chest toward the right, suggesting digital cleansing and connectivity. On the right side, a tall matte-white spray bottle floats upright, labeled "SECURE-IP" and "IP ADDRESS CLEANSER," with smaller product copy beneath and a subtle premium cosmetic finish. Behind and around the bottle, branching translucent stems rise like biotech coral or neural fibers, each ending in clear glowing bubbles; several bubbles contain faint tech text such as "DATA PACKET," while nearby micro labels identify features including "OXYGEN FLOW," "DATA PACKETS," "SECURE ROUTING," "RISK FILTER," "PRIVATE CLEAN," and "CONNECTION PURE." In the upper left, small brand text reads "IP 9OXYGEN TECHNOLOGY." A large bold uppercase headline dominates the left-center: "BREATHE SECURE. GLOW FREE." with a smaller subheading below reading "for risk-free connections." Along the bottom is a row of 4 minimalist icon-and-text feature blocks, evenly spaced: 1) shield icon with the heading "CLEANSE YOUR IP" and short supporting copy, 2) wifi icon with the heading "SECURE CONNECTIONS" and short supporting copy, 3) leaf icon with the heading "BREATHE FREELY" and short supporting copy, 4) share/network icon with the heading "GLOW CONFIDENTLY" and short supporting copy. At the lower right, add a paragraph of marketing copy about constant connection and digital cleansing, ending with the tagline "BREATHE. CONNECT. GLOW." At the lower left, include a circular IP logo and the brand line "SECURE-IP" with a small subtitle like "OXYGEN FOR YOUR DIGITAL LIFE." Overall style: surreal product advertising, premium editorial poster, clean sans-serif typography, soft bloom, translucent glass spheres, elegant sci-fi wellness branding, ultra-detailed, polished, magazine-quality layout.
